pokemon:naclstack.name: Naclstack
pokemon:naclstack.summary: This Pokémon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey’s body.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey’s body.
It compresses rock salt inside its body and shoots out hardened salt pellets with enough force to perforate an iron sheet.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey’s body.

pokemon:nacli.name: Nacli
pokemon:nacli.summary: It was born in a layer of rock salt deep under the earth. This species was particularly treasured in the old days, as they would share precious salt.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It was born in a layer of rock salt deep under the earth. This species was particularly treasured in the old days, as they would share precious salt.
The ground scrapes its body as it travels, causing it to leave salt behind. Salt is constantly being created and replenished inside Nacli’s body.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It was born in a layer of rock salt deep under the earth. This species was particularly treasured in the old days, as they would share precious salt.

pokemon:garganacl.name: Garganacl
pokemon:garganacl.summary: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward.
Many Pokémon gather around Garganacl, hoping to lick at its mineral-rich salt.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward.
